hero.description: Discover the timeless elegance of Algerian craftsmanship. Our caftans, symbols of refinement and heritage, blend tradition and modernity — hand-woven with gold threads and noble fabrics.

atelier.title: Our Workshop
atelier.text: For three generations, our workshop has perpetuated the ancestral art of the Algerian caftan. Each piece is unique, hand-woven with gold and silver threads, adorned with traditional motifs revisited with a contemporary touch. Our master craftsmen put all their know-how at the service of your elegance.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Caftan Lamaa - Algerian Haute Couture. All rights reserved.
